title: What is Social Justice? Definition, Key Principles and Examples
content: Socialjusticeis the view that everyone deserves equal rights, opportunities, and treatment regardless of theirsocialgroup or classification. Learn about the five key principles ofsocialjustice(access, diversity, equity, participation, and human rights) and some examples ofsocialjusticeissues (mass incarceration, racial inequality, LGBTQ+ discrimination).
